facebook.details: Add OAuth/client credentials and page mapping, then implement publish adapter wiring.

x.details: Add OAuth/app credentials and thread/media post support.

instagram.details: Needs Instagram/Meta account link plus reel/image scheduling flow.

tiktok.details: Needs TikTok auth plus video publishing and scheduler pipeline.

linkedin.details: Needs LinkedIn app credentials and org/person posting routing.

youtube.details: Plan long-form/shorts upload workflow after core text/media scheduling is stable.

rss.details: Wire feed ingest → content transform → post queue pipeline.

templates.name: Universal text/link post flow
templates.notes: Connect compose UI, validation, draft storage, schedule persistence, and direct publish execution.

templates.name: Media publishing flow
templates.notes: Wire upload handling, media metadata, scheduling, and per-platform publish adapters.

templates.name: RSS to social pipeline
templates.notes: Turn RSS items into drafts or scheduled posts with optional approval/autopublish logic.

agents.name: Default Social Agent
agents.goal: Create, schedule, publish, and optionally interact according to user rules.

main_agent.notes: Main chat agent should become a superuser for Social Station so it can do everything the UI can do and more.

rss.notes: Populate feed definitions and target mappings here until dedicated UI/API write flows are added.
